releaseImpact.cloudFunctions: Deploy current-state post RAG scheduling, worker, search filtering, and post-release operations. The release does not execute RAG validation.
releaseImpact.miniprogram: No RAG response contract change is required.
environmentVariables: Reconcile CloudBase plus Tencent atomic pay-per-call RAG variables and remove retired ES variables.
Keep independent worker, timer, and signed smoke secrets.
databaseMigrations: Create post_rag_sync_state and its current-state indexes through ensure-indexes. No backfill or production classification runs during release.
